response_constraints: Retrieve the existing summary before issuing the dependent summary update.
Confirm the change only after memory_update_summary succeeds, without claiming unrelated memories changed.

stages.purpose: Read the current recursive summary so its unrelated facts can be preserved.

arguments.summary: Community exhibition: opening is November 8. Fourteen artists confirmed. Poster proof due October 10.

stages.purpose: Write the revised full summary after incorporating the retrieved content and the user's single requested change.

state_assertions: summary == "Community exhibition: opening is November 8. Fourteen artists confirmed. Poster proof due October 10."

prompt: Retrieve the community-exhibition summary and update the confirmed artist count from twelve to fourteen. Do not alter the opening or proof dates.

tool_results.summary: Community exhibition: opening is November 8. Twelve artists confirmed. Poster proof due October 10.
